title.en: China-to-Chile Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Chile SEC photovoltaic product authorization, IEC 62109 safety evidence, CNE / Coordinador grid-connection expectations, 50 Hz operation, EMC evidence, and China GB/T baseline standards.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与智利SEC光伏产品授权、IEC 62109安全证明、CNE/协调机构并网要求、50 Hz运行、EMC证明及中国GB/T基线标准差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與智利SEC光伏產品授權、IEC 62109安全證明、CNE/協調機構併網要求、50 Hz運行、EMC證明及中國GB/T基線標準差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SEC product-authorization decision, CNE grid-code interpretation, Coordinador connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Chile SEC, CNE, Coordinador, distribution-company, installation, product-authorization, grid-connection, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, declaration, sale, installation, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SEC产品授权决定、CNE电网规范解释、协调机构并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货、申报、销售、安装或调试前，应与合格专业人士核验现行智利SEC、CNE、协调机构、配电公司、安装、产品授权、并网及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SEC產品授權決定、CNE電網規範解釋、協調機構併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、申報、銷售、安裝或調試前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行智利SEC、CNE、協調機構、配電公司、安裝、產品授權、併網及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Chile, the main gap is not a simple China GB/T-to-Chile equivalence. SEC authorization for photovoltaic products and installation declaration routes, IEC 62109 safety evidence, Chilean 50 Hz grid settings, CNE / Coordinador connection rules, and project-specific PMGD or distributed-generation procedures must be addressed before the inverter is used in a Chilean grid-connected PV project.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口智利时，主要差距不是简单的中国GB/T与智利标准等同。逆变器用于智利并网光伏项目之前，应处理SEC光伏产品授权及安装申报路径、IEC 62109安全证明、智利50 Hz电网参数、CNE/协调机构并网规则，以及项目适用的PMGD或分布式发电程序。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口智利時，主要差距不是簡單的中國GB/T與智利標準等同。逆變器用於智利併網光伏項目之前，應處理SEC光伏產品授權及安裝申報路徑、IEC 62109安全證明、智利50 Hz電網參數、CNE/協調機構併網規則，以及項目適用的PMGD或分散式發電程序。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
